## Code Review Report

### Verdict: WARN

Found 1 medium issue.

### MEDIUM Findings

**Missing null check in getUserById**
`src/users/service.ts:42` — The function does not check for null before accessing `user.email`.

## Security Review Report

### Verdict: FAIL

Found 1 high severity issue.

### HIGH Findings

**SQL injection risk in searchUsers**
`src/users/repository.ts:88` — Raw string concatenation used in SQL query.

findings.title: Missing null check in getUserById
findings.description: The getUserById function does not check for null before accessing user.email, which will throw if the user is not found.

findings.title: SQL injection risk in searchUsers
findings.description: The searchUsers function uses raw string concatenation to build SQL queries, allowing SQL injection if user input is not sanitized.
